description: Portrait/vertical adaptation -- how scene geometries adapt to 9:16 (1080x1920) aspect ratio. FOV adjustments, plane resizing strategy (taller walls, narrower floors for tunnel in portrait), whether geometries need parallel variants or can auto-adapt based on composition aspect ratio. Addresses OQ-04 and C-04 (must support 1080x1920).
notes: Tier 3 spatial feature. Medium priority. Addresses OQ-04.
